name: playpatch
description: Self-hosted, parent-controlled video streaming platform for children
author: PlayPatch Team

scripts.setup:env: cp .env.example .env && echo 'Created .env file. Please edit it and set NEXTAUTH_SECRET'
scripts.db:migrate: cd apps/web && pnpm prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:migrate:prod: cd apps/web && pnpm prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:push: cd apps/web && pnpm prisma db push
scripts.docker:dev: cd infrastructure/compose && docker compose --env-file ../../.env -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d
scripts.docker:dev:attach: cd infrastructure/compose && docker compose --env-file ../../.env -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml up
scripts.docker:dev:build: cd infrastructure/compose && docker compose --env-file ../../.env -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml up --build -d
scripts.docker:prod: cd infrastructure/compose && docker compose --env-file ../../.env -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.prod.yml up -d
scripts.docker:stop: cd infrastructure/compose && docker compose --env-file ../../.env -f docker-compose.yml stop
scripts.docker:down: cd infrastructure/compose && docker compose --env-file ../../.env -f docker-compose.yml down
scripts.docker:logs: cd infrastructure/compose && docker compose --env-file ../../.env -f docker-compose.yml logs -f
scripts.docker:logs:app: cd infrastructure/compose && docker compose --env-file ../../.env -f docker-compose.yml logs -f web
scripts.docker:status: cd infrastructure/compose && docker compose --env-file ../../.env -f docker-compose.yml ps
scripts.docker:clean: cd infrastructure/compose && docker compose --env-file ../../.env -f docker-compose.yml down -v
scripts.ollama:pull: docker exec -it playpatch-ollama ollama pull llama3.1:8b
